## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for any change to the hook or skill logic.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` with a one-line entry in the appropriate subsection.

- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes locally.
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally.
